delete-account.title: Are you sure you want to delete your account?
delete-account.warning: ⚠️ Warning: This action is irreversible. Once confirmed, your account will be permanently deleted along with all your data.
delete-account.important: 💡 Important: Once deleted, we will not be able to recover your information or active subscriptions.
delete-account.email-notice: 📧 The email associated with this account cannot be reused. You will need to register with a different email address.
delete-account.error-message: Error deleting account. Please try again.

leave-app.title: You are about to leave the app and go to an external website. You will no longer be making transactions with Apple.
leave-app.body: Accounts or purchases made outside this app will be managed by the developer "BodyBooster". Your App Store account, saved payment method, and related features such as subscription management and refund requests will not be available. Apple will not be responsible for the privacy or security of transactions made with this developer.

leave-app-android.title: You are about to leave the app and go to an external website. You will no longer be making transactions with Google Play.
leave-app-android.body: Accounts or purchases made outside this app will be managed by the developer "BodyBooster". Your Play Store account, saved payment method, and related features such as subscription management and refund requests will not be available. Google will not be responsible for the privacy or security of transactions made with this developer.

app-update.title: Update available
app-update.message: A new version of the app is available in the store. Please update to keep enjoying all the features.

stripe-identification.title: Identification Required
stripe-identification.message: Before continuing with Stripe, make sure you have your official identification and your bank CLABE account on hand. You will need them to complete the registration.
stripe-identification.additional-info: Stripe will verify your identity independently. The process may take 24 hours to 7 business days.

stripe-onboarding-result.success-title: Congratulations! You have completed your Stripe registration
stripe-onboarding-result.success-message: Your account has been verified successfully. You are now ready to receive payments.
stripe-onboarding-result.error-title: Oops! There was a problem with Stripe.
stripe-onboarding-result.error-message: Don't worry, this can happen sometimes. If the problem persists, log out and sign in again.
